context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile forensic audit at 390x844 complete. CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute no longer blocks page navigation with 'Establishing secure connection...' loading screen. All pages render content immediately. Test account is on Free tier, so SoundBoard shows paywall and Operations shows Enterprise tier gate - this is expected. The account has no CRM/accounting/email integrations connected, so Revenue/Market/Operations pages show 'connect' prompts. Tutorial overlays appear on first visit to pages and are dismissable.
